nasb.text: The woman *said to Him, “I know that Messiah is coming (He who is called Christ); when that One comes, He will declare all things to us.”

esv.text: The woman said to him, “I know that Messiah is coming (he who is called Christ). When he comes, he will tell us all things.”

cnv.text: 婦人說：“我知道那稱為基督的彌賽亞要來；他來了，要把一切都告訴我們。”

ccb.text: 妇人说：“据我所知，那被称为基督的弥赛亚要来。祂来了，会把一切都告诉我们。”

csbs.text: 妇人说：“我知道那称为基督的弥赛亚要来。他来的时候，就会把一切都传讲给我们。”
